summary: Frontend-only verification completed on http://127.0.0.1:3001 for requested Next.js web flows. Home rendered correctly, compare section rendered with working navigation to vendor detail, vendors list/detail pages worked, booking page integrated with mock availability/bookings, and success page loaded after a valid booking submission.

issues: Header CTA touch target appears below 44px minimum on mobile (py-2 + text-sm likely ~36px high).

action_items: Increase mobile header CTA tap area to at least 44px for accessibility.
For regression tests, use dynamic future date selection (skip already-booked dates) because mock booking persistence can consume static test dates.
Code review: consider removing fallback '/api' behavior in /app/web/src/lib/api.ts to fully enforce env-based fail-fast URL configuration.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/web/src/lib/api.ts currently falls back to '/api' when NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL/EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is missing, which deviates from strict env-only fail-fast configuration guidance.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (requested scoped flows passed after valid unbooked date selection)

seed_data_creation: Created one booking record via web flow for rosewood-manor on 2099-12-23 (test submission through MOCKED booking API).
context_for_next_testing_agent: IMPORTANT: APIs involved here are MOCKED (n8n availability webhook and n8n booking submission webhook). During this run, date 2099-12-22 was already booked and correctly rejected; selecting unbooked date 2099-12-23 succeeded and redirected to success page with bookingId query params.
rca_of_issue: Initial booking submission failure was reproducible with date 2099-12-22 because mock availability already marked it booked. This is expected validation behavior, not a booking-page functional defect. Mitigation: choose date not present in booked_dates list before submitting.
